items.title: Samsung Galaxy Z Fold8 Ultra Nearly Closes the Camera Gap
items.summary: Samsung has unveiled the Galaxy Z Fold8 Ultra, Galaxy Z Fold8, and Galaxy Z Flip8. The new foldables embrace new designs, upgraded specs, and some better cameras. [Read More]

items.title: San Francisco Restaurant Defaced Over AI-Generated Food Photos
items.summary: A San Francisco restaurant has found out the hard way just how strong the anti-AI sentiment is after their cafe was defaced by disgruntled locals. [Read More]

items.title: Passionfroot raises $15M to expand its B2B creator marketplace to the US
items.summary: Passionfroot, a German startup building a marketplace connecting B2B creators with brands, has raised $15M in a Series A round led by Insight Partners.

items.title: WhatsApp adds Apple CarPlay and Android Auto upgrades, iPad sign-ups, and more
items.summary: WhatsApp on Apple CarPlay and Android Auto will let users hear and reply to messages, make calls, view their call history, and access favorite contacts hands-free and right from their car's screen.

items.title: Jimothy, Meme and Muse
items.summary: Artists share tributes to the beloved raccoon, plus Sabri Sundos’s odes to Palestinian diaspora and memory.

items.title: Chelsea Wolfe Reveals New Album The Dark, Lines Up 2026 Tour
items.summary: The LP’s lead single, “Cold,” is out now

items.title: Are NewJeans Really Back?
items.summary: A series of four videos posted to the K-pop group’s YouTube channel signal “the summer of NewJeans”

items.title: Sabri Sundos Faces Catastrophe With Flowers
items.summary: “I am obsessed with autonomy and movement,” the Palestinian-American artist tells Hyperallergic in an interview.
